heading: Today
text: Increasing clouds. Chance of snow or valley rain showers in the north, mainly in New York. Highs from the mid 30s to around 40. East to northeast winds 5 to 10 mph, becoming south 5 to 15 mph.

heading: Tonight
text: Chance of rain showers; some freezing rain possible along and east of the Greens, and in far northern New York. Lows from the mid 30s to around 40, some lower 30s east of the Greens and in far northern New York; temperatures rising late. Winds becoming south to southeast and gusting to 30 mph, except gusting to 50 mph in the advisory areas, and to 60 mph in the warning area.

heading: Monday
text: A few pockets of freezing rain possible early east of the Greens, otherwise scattered rain showers. Highs from the upper 50s to mid 60s west of the Greens, mid 50s to around 60 east. South to southeast winds gusting to 40 mph, except gusting to 50 mph in the advisory areas, and to 60 mph in the warning area.
